query:
UPDATE session_log
            SET completed_at = NOW(),
                error_code = COALESCE(error_code, 'agent_disconnected'),
                error_message = COALESCE(error_message, $2),
                outcome = CASE
                    WHEN paired_at IS NULL THEN 'error'::session_log_outcome
                    ELSE outcome
                END
            WHERE session_id = $1
            RETURNING session_id
